benefits.description: Down 40 pounds, weight and belt notch/pants size still dropping. Goal weight is 15 pounds away.

protocol_notes: Responding strongly to modest dose. Notes that Phase 2 clinical trials showed everyone lost weight on Reta with no 'non-responders'. Concerned about product quality variability between sources. Plans to reduce Reta dose and/or frequency after reaching goal weight to maintain weight and avoid typical loss/gain cycle. Planning to purchase 10 vial setup for maintenance dosing.
